versions.version_description: Based on the studio version of the song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Whenever Jason sings lyrics that are in quotes for example, "Hell no, I don't" play this riff as optional:

[tab]e|-------------------------|
B|----11--9------11--9-----|
G|-----------11------------|
D|-------------------------|
A|-------------------------|
E|-------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
She said, "Baby, do you ever miss bein' alone?"[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
I said, "Hell no, I don't"[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]                                  [ch]A[/ch]
She said, "Do you really think I'm where you belong?"[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
I said, "You know and I know..."[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
You're perfect for me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Everything I'll ever need[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]
I ain't playin'[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
What I'm sayin'[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                            [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
When I got what I got, I don't miss what I had[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
The old me before you belongs to the past[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
In the back of your mind, you might think there's somethin' more I want[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
But when I got what I got, girl, I don't[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
e|-------------------------|
B|---4--2-----4--2---------|
G|---------3---------------|
D|-------------------------|
A|-------------------------|
E|-------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]                                   [ch]A[/ch]
I said, "Baby, do you know you sound a little crazy[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
When you're talkin' like that, girl?"[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]                                    [ch]A[/ch]
Ain't no second thoughts, no regrets, no kinda maybe[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
No wishin' I turned back[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Before you came along[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
I could go all alone[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B[/ch]
Girl, just kiss me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
You're all that I want[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                            [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
When I got what I got, I don't miss what I had[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
The old me before you belongs to the past[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
In the back of your mind, you might think there's somethin' more I want[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
But when I got what I got, girl, I don't[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
She said, "Baby, do you ever miss bein' alone?"[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
I said, "Hell no, I don't"[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                            [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
When I got what I got, I don't miss what I had[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
The old me before you belongs to the past[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
In the back of your mind, you might think there's somethin' more I want[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
But when I got what I got, girl, I don't[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]
No, I don't[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
No, I don't[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
When I got what I got, girl, I don't[/tab]
